'''Ogomoor''', an [[Ansionian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was the [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] of [[Soergg Vosadii Bezhin]]. He was killed in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] by Soergg when he attempted to give the [[Unity Council]] evidence of his criminal activities. Soergg claimed that Ogomoor had looked like he was drawing a weapon, and that he had killed him in self-defense.

{{Char-stub}}
